mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friends_request AS fr WHERE (send_user_id = #{userId} AND accept_user_id = #{friendUserId}) OR (accept_user_id = #{userId} AND send_user_id = #{friendUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username, u.nickname, u.face_image AS faceImage FROM friends_request AS fr INNER JOIN users AS u ON fr.send_user_id = u.id WHERE fr.accept_user_id = #{acceptUserId}
